user_query: I'm planning a family trip to Miami next week. Can you provide me with the current weather conditions in Miami and any weather alerts that I should be aware of? Also, give me an hourly forecast for the next 48 hours. Additionally, I would like to know the air quality forecasts for Miami during our stay.

TaskList.description: Fetch the current weather conditions in Miami.
Check for any weather alerts in Miami.
Retrieve the hourly weather forecast for the next 48 hours in Miami.
Get the air quality forecasts for Miami during the planned stay.
